positive: A minimalist, geometric design of a crescent moon and scattered constellations, depicted in a bold, distressed line-art style. The composition should feature a central, elegant curve (the moon) framed by stylized, interlocking celestial elements (stars and constellations). Use deep navy blue and celestial gold ink tones against a crisp white background. The linework must be crisp, strong, and perfectly centered for maximum apparel impact. The overall feel should be mystical, sophisticated, and timeless, drawing inspiration from Art Nouveau geometry but simplified for modern graphic print appeal. High contrast, clean silhouette, seamless for repetition.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, logos, trademarks, sloppy lines, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, gradient, photo, 3d, volumetric, messy, background clutter
